title: 3D Mace
description: This pack aims to turn the 2D item sprite of the mace into a neatly stylized 3D model!
body:
![RP logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb86be0ce893589daf3f26b8c4d2dab306b007b.png)

This pack aims to turn the 2D item sprite of the mace into a neatly stylized 3D model!

Note that the resource pack will only work on versions 24w11a and above! It is only marked as 1.20.4 because it's the newest version modrinth allows currently.
